title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Komurasaki, Unknown person #15, Toko, Orochi as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You dare laugh at me, you brat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That girl laughs at everything! She doesn't mean any harm by it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My Lord! She's a child! Mercy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apologize, Komurasaki! GRIND YOUR HEAD INTO THE FLOOR! GROVEL!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I believe am in the right, I shall not yield a single step!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, Komurasaki... I... I was going to make you my wife...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you wish for a weak man, then, by all fans, kill me and toss me aside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Wish F woman, means, h toss a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A whore like you has no right to talk of Warrior Heritage,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am a warrior's daughter! I shall not live on my knees!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! Huh? You're the lady from the Soba shop!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi! We're in the castle!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
